questions.question: A LCR series A.C circuit is tuned to resonance. The impedance of the circuit is now
Resonance frequency of LCR series a.c. circuit is $f_0$. Now the capacitance is made 4 times, then the new resonance frequency will become
The dimensions of $RC$ are same as the dimensions of which of the following?

In an A.C. circuit, a resistance of R ohm is connected in series with an inductor of self inductance L. If phase angle between voltage and current be 45°, the value of inductive reactance ($X_L$) will be equal to ......

At time t = 0 second, voltage of an A.C. Generator starts from 0 V and becomes 2 V at time $t = \frac{1}{100 \pi}$ second. The voltage keeps on increasing up to 100 V, after which it starts to decrease. Find the frequency of the Generator.

In a series resonant circuit, the A. C. voltages across resistance $R$, inductor $L$ and capacitor $C$ are $5 \text{ V}$, $10 \text{ V}$ and $10 \text{ V}$ respectively. The A.C. voltage applied to the circuit will be .........
What is the average power dissipation in an ideal capacitor in A.C. circuit ?
A coil has self inductance $L = 0.04 \text{ H}$ and resistance $R = 12 \Omega$. When it is connected to $220 \text{ V}$, $50 \text{ Hz}$ supply; what will be the current flowing through the coil ?
Find the time required for a $50\text{Hz}$ alternating current to become its value from zero to the $rms$ value.
What should be the value of self inductance of an inductor that should be connected to $220\text{ V}$, $50\text{ Hz}$ supply so that a maximum current of $0.9\text{ A}$ flows through it ?
The peak value of an alternating current is $5\text{ A}$ and its frequency is $60\text{ Hz}$. Find its rms value and time taken to reach the peak value of current starting from zero.
The output power in step-up transformer used in practice is ________.
A lamp consumes only $50\%$ of maximum power applied in an A.C. circuit. What will be the phase difference between applied voltage and circuit current?
An electric current has both D.C. and A.C. Components D.C. Component of $8 \text{A}$ and A.C. Component is given as $I = 6 \sin \omega t$. So $I_{\text{rms}}$ value of resultant current is ________.

A current of $\frac{25}{\pi}\text{ Hz}$ frequency is passing through an A.C. circuit having series combination of $R = 100\text{ }\Omega$ and $L = 2\text{ H}$, the phase difference between voltage and current is ________.
In A.C. circuit having only capacitor, the current ________.

options.A: leads the voltage by \frac{\pi}{2} in phase
options.B: lags behind the voltage by \frac{\pi}{2} in phase
options.C: leads the voltage by \pi in phase
options.D: lags behind the voltage by \pi in phase

questions.question: An alternating voltage given as $V = 100\sqrt{2}\sin 100t\text{ volt}$ is applied to a capacitor of $1\text{ }\mu\text{F}$. The current reading of the ammeter will be equal to ________ $\text{mA}$.
In an AC circuit, current is 3 A and voltage 210 V and power is 63 W. The power factor is
For an A.C given by $I = 50 \cos(100t + 45^\circ)$A. The value of $I_{rms} = ______$ A.
An A.C voltage $V = 5 \cos(1000t)$ V is applied to a L-R series circuit of inductance 3 mH and resistance 4 $\Omega$. The value of maximum current in the circuit is _____ A.
A lamp consumes only $50\%$ of maximum power in an A.C. circuit. What is the phase difference between the applied voltage and the circuit current?
A capacitor 'C' is connected across a D.C. source, the reactance of capacitor will be ___
A sinusoidal A.C. current flows through a resistor of resistance $10\Omega$. If the peak current is $2\text{A}$ flowing through the resistor then the power dissipated in ____ $\text{W}$.
If in an A.C., L-C series circuit $X_C > X_L$. Hence potential ..............

options.A: Lags behind the current by $\pi$ in phase
options.B: Leads the current by $\frac{\pi}{2}$ in phase
options.C: Leads the current by $\pi$ in phase
options.D: Lags behind the current by $\frac{\pi}{2}$ in phase

questions.question: In L-C-R, A.C. series circuit, $L = 9\text{H}$, $R = 10\Omega$ & $C = 100\mu\text{F}$. Hence Q-factor of the circuit is .........
A bulb of $100\text{ W}$ rating is connected with $220\text{ V}$ supply. The resistance of bulb is .........

A sine voltage having maximum value of $283\text{ V}$ & frequency of $50\text{ Hz}$ is applied to LCR series connection where $R = 3\text{ }\Omega$, $L = 25.48\text{ mH}$ & $C = 796\text{ }\mu\text{F}$. Then impedance is ........ at resonance condition.
What is correct for real transformer?
For LCR ac series circuits, $L = 25\text{ mH}$, $R = 3\Omega$, $C = 62.5\text{ }\mu\text{F}$. What is the frequency of the sources at which resonance occurs?
For a series LCR circuit with $L = 2\text{ H}$, $C = 18\text{ }\mu\text{F}$ and $R = 10\text{ }\Omega$. What is the value Q-factor of this circuit?
A $50\text{ }\mu\text{F}$ capacitor is connected to a $110\text{ V}$, $60\text{ Hz}$ ac supply. Determine the rms value of the current in the circuit.
For an ideal transformer, if $N_s > N_p$ then ________.
A charged $10\mu\text{F}$ capacitor is connected to a $16\text{mH}$ inductor. What is the angular frequency of free oscillations of the circuit?

A pure inductor of 25.48 mH and a pure resistor of $8 \, \Omega$ are connected in series with an A.C. source of frequency 50 Hz. The phase difference between current (I) and voltage (V) in this circuit is ________.
The charge of the capacitor in L-C oscillatory circuit, when the energy associated with inductor and capacitor are equal, is ________. [$Q_0$ is the initial charge on the capacitor].
The output of a stepdown transformer is measured to be 24V when connected to a 12 watt light bulb. The value of peak current ($I_m$) is ________ A.
A pure inductor of $50.0\text{ mH}$ is connected to a source of $220\text{ V}$. Then rms current in the circuit will be ________. The frequency of the source is $50\text{Hz}$.
In LCR series a.c. circuit at resonance the value of power factor will be ________.
If the primary coil of a transformer has $100$ turns and the secondary has $200$ turns. Then for a input of $220\text{ V}$ at $10\text{ A}$ find output current, in step up transformer.
For obtaining wattless current ________ is connected with a.c. supply.
What is the approximate percentage value of maximum voltage to its rms value in LCR AC circuit?
In which of the following AC circuit, we get the value of power factor 1 at resonance condition?
The output voltage of a step-down transformer is measured to be 24V, when connected to a 12 watt light bulb. The value of the peak current is ________.
In an AC generator, induced emf $\epsilon = 0$ at $t = 0$, then its value ________.
